Package org.areslib.math.controller

Class ProfiledPIDController

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.math.controller.ProfiledPIDController
public class ProfiledPIDController extends Object
A PID Controller configured to follow a Trapezoidal Motion Profile. Generates smooth deceleration and velocity limiting instead of aggressive snaps.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • ProfiledPIDController

      public ProfiledPIDController(double kp, double ki, double kd, double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration)
      Parameters:
      kp - The proportional coefficient.
      ki - The integral coefficient.
      kd - The derivative coefficient.
      maxVelocity - The maximum allowable velocity.
      maxAcceleration - The maximum allowable acceleration.

    • ProfiledPIDController

      public ProfiledPIDController(double kp, double ki, double kd, double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration, double period)
      Parameters:
      kp - The proportional coefficient.
      ki - The integral coefficient.
      kd - The derivative coefficient.
      maxVelocity - The maximum allowable velocity.
      maxAcceleration - The maximum allowable acceleration.
      period - The exact control loop period in seconds (vital for determinism).

  • Method Details

    • setGoal

      public void setGoal(double goal)
      Sets the final mathematical goal the system should reach.
      Parameters:
      goal - The target position.

    • getGoal

      public double getGoal()
      Returns the current goal position.
      Returns:
      The goal position.

    • setConstraints

      public void setConstraints(double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration)
      Sets the velocity and acceleration constraints for the profile
      Parameters:
      maxVelocity - Maximum velocity
      maxAcceleration - Maximum acceleration

    • enableContinuousInput

      public void enableContinuousInput(double minimumInput, double maximumInput)
      Enables continuous input wrapping on the internal PID controller. This is essential for angular control (e.g., heading) where -PI and PI are adjacent.
      Parameters:
      minimumInput - The minimum input value (e.g., -Math.PI).
      maximumInput - The maximum input value (e.g., Math.PI).

    • reset

      public void reset(double currentPosition, double currentVelocity)
      Sets the current state of the mechanism. Call this once when initializing a movement.
      Parameters:
      currentPosition - The current position of the mechanism.
      currentVelocity - The current velocity of the mechanism.

    • calculate

      public double calculate(double currentMeasurement)
      Calculates the next output of the controller using deterministic simulation time.
      Parameters:
      currentMeasurement - The current position measurement.
      Returns:
      The control effort to apply.

    • getSetpointPosition

      public double getSetpointPosition()

    • getSetpointVelocity

      public double getSetpointVelocity()
